payload.name: Electrical Engineering
tools_required: SPICE or power electronics simulation tool
bench power supply with current limiting
electronic load or representative AC load

safety_extensions: SafetyExtension(schema='safety-extension/1', extension_id='safext:01KT30JKD4BJWJE5Z6NV8RET46', domain_id='domain:01KT30JKCSC8XKXXC23RBR1ZSY', description='Treat as hazardous high-voltage power electronics. bench power supply with current limiting
electronic load or representative AC load
